parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 500, temperature: 0, system: 'You are a B2B enterprise sales qualification agent for Bronte, an AI-native risk platform selling to Tier 1 banks and financial institutions in Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore. Evaluate LinkedIn prospect profiles against Bronte\'s ICP: Tier 1 banks in AU/NZ/SG, C-suite or VP/Director roles in Risk, Compliance, Technology, or Finance. Score 1-10 for ICP fit. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: icp_fit_score (number), fit_rationale (string), role_relevance (high/medium/low), decision_authority (economic_buyer/champion/influencer/end_user/unknown), recommended_approach (priority_outreach/warm_introduction/nurture/skip), connection_notes (string), hubspot_tags (array of strings).', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Evaluate this LinkedIn prospect against Bronte ICP criteria:\n\n' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: $json.company + ' — ' + $json.fullName, pipeline: 'default', dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', amount: '1000000' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { deal_health_score: String($('Parse ICP Score').first().json.icp_fit_score), meddpicc_champion: $('Parse ICP Score').first().json.connection_notes || 'Needs discovery', meddpicc_pain: $('Parse ICP Score').first().json.fit_rationale || 'Needs discovery' } }) }}
